author: SantiMod
content:
If you bought, sold an NFT or cancelled an order and you don't see the USDC or the NFT in your wallet, please read below
You will probably need to follow these “How To Claim Manually” instructions: https://bit.ly/access-star-atlas-nft-markets
You can also check on https://app.step.finance/#/dashboard for unclaimed assets

If you follow the steps and don't see the funds/NFTs, please wait, some nodes are under heavy traffic right now. Everything is on-chain and you won't lose your assets. Please be patient
